modules.label: Website uptime
modules.description: Monitor public site availability, SSL windows, response time, support routing, and incidents.

modules.label: Launch readiness
modules.description: Track product readiness, blockers, next actions, release artifacts, and owner review.

modules.label: App testing
modules.description: Track APK/AAB intake, approved test suites, test runner jobs, and evidence.

modules.label: Support routing
modules.description: Confirm all public forms and contact flows route to the correct inbox.

modules.description: Track domains, DNS status, SSL status, registrar notes, hosting target, and renewal risk.

modules.label: Billing and usage
modules.description: Track Stripe plans, seats, usage thresholds, payment state, and shutoff risk. Requires authentication before implementation.
